name: jrobic-cc-harness-setup-example
_versionNote: version intentionally omitted so installs track the git commit SHA — every push to main is picked up by `/plugin marketplace update`. Pin a semver here when cutting a stable release.
description: Example harness plugin for Claude Code. Merges a deny list into settings.json, copies a team context file into ~/.claude/harness/CONTEXT.md, and ensures a managed import block in CLAUDE.md. All writes require explicit developer confirmation.
